description: CompositionBlue floral print kurta made of 100% cotton, with a keyhole neckline that has green piping and drawstrings with bead and thread work, pintucks on the front chest with lace detailing and side slits on the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this blue floral print kurta with its off-side keyhole neck, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
